description_long: This object is a classic fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a rounded top. The top features a short, flat, circular cap from which a black hose extends, curving downward and ending in a slightly flared nozzle. Two flat, black levers or handles are attached at the top, positioned for easy gripping and operation. The body is smooth and unadorned, with no visible labels or markings. The hose is attached along one side of the cylinder, and the overall design is utilitarian, typical for emergency fire suppression equipment found in urban environments.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose and two flat handles at the top, designed for emergency use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the red cylinder, black hose curving to the left, and two flat black handles at the top.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the back of the cylinder with the hose running straight down and minimal detail on the handles.
description_view_2: This angled view highlights the top handles and the hose curving to the right, showing more of the nozzle's end.
description_view_3: The side view emphasizes the full length of the hose running vertically along the cylinder and the top cap.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached at the top, curving down the side and ending in a flared nozzle.
